title: Color by column
excerpt: Please could we be able to edit the colour of the column on a dashboard.  The color is currently edited by Board, Group, Status etc…  But this doesn’t allow us to assign a colour which relates to the same colour as the w…

posts.author: Dicky_lewis (Dicky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please could we be able to edit the colour of the column on a dashboard. The color is currently edited by Board, Group, Status etc… But this doesn’t allow us to assign a colour which relates to the same colour as the workspace we have already selected. I’ve uploaded a screenshot for an example where " Finance" columen has been asssigned as orange, but I would like to change this to the same Blue as the “Finance” workspace I have referenced this from.

Screenshot 2024-06-30 1355161635×1359 195 KB

posts.author: Dicky_lewis (Dicky)
posts.cookedHtml:
is there any update on this. I also would love to be able to control the randomly assigned colours to ‘owners’ I’ve attached a screen shot. Can I change the colours assigned to the people on this chart?
